TweakWhy_AccountProtectionWarn: Kaaraange Windows dafay wone ab àrtu sudee dugguloo ci ab sàqum Microsoft. Deactivate dafay nëbb yëgle bii di dellusi.
TweakWhy_ActiveHours: Mandargal diir bi Windows du tàmbaliwaat sa ordinatër ci saasi ngir jeexal samp yeesali ordinatër bi.
TweakWhy_ActivityHistory: Dafay enregistre sa liggéey ci costéef yi soo duggee ci sàqum Microsoft ba noppi mën ko senkronise ak cloud bi. Desactiver dafay tax liggéey bi nekk ci barab bi.
TweakWhy_AdminApprovalMode: Dafay saytu ni Kontrolu Kontu Jëfandikukat bi di doxee su aplikaasioŋ bi sàkkee ay yelleef yu gëna kawe. Laajte yiñ jagleel ngir nangu, Bul musa dindi laajte UAC yi. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_AdobeNetworkBlock: Yokk ay sàrti pare-feu ngir tere aplikaasioŋu Adobe dugg ci internet. Loolu dafay indi jafe-jafe ci siiwal lisence bi, senkronisation cloud bi ak man-mani Creative Cloud. Lii coppite bu am risk la, te mën na nekk lu jafe wala lu jafe ñu delloo ko.
TweakWhy_AdvancedStartupShortcut: Sosal gaawaayu biro biy tàmbaliwaat ci saasi PC bi ci mënu Tànneefi tàmbali yu xóot yi (Windows Recovery Environment).
TweakWhy_AdvertisingID: Windows dafay jox sa kontu benn ID piblisite bu aplikaasioŋ yi mëna jëfandikoo ngir wane piblisite yiñ tànn. Deactivate dafay taxawal topp bii.
TweakWhy_AeroShaking: Yëngal bar titre palanteer bi dafay wàññi yeneen palanteer yu ubbeeku yépp. Deactivé sudee gis nga ni loolu dafay tàmbali ci anam wu jaarul yoon ci diir bi ngay jëfandikoo bu baax.
TweakWhy_AppColorMode: Defar anam melo bi aplikaasioŋ yi di jëfandikoo suñu toppee jekkal sistem bi: Lëndëm wala Leer.
TweakWhy_AppsLanguageSwitch: Dafay may Windows mu fàttaliku ak soppi ci beneen làkku dugal wala xeetu klaweer bu nekk ci palanteer aplikaasioŋ bu nekk.
TweakWhy_AppsSilentInstalling: Windows mën na samp app yiñ la xelal ci background bi te doo laaj. Desactiver dafay taxawal doxalin bii. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_AppsSmartScreen: SmartScreen dafay saytu fichier yiñ yebbi ak aplikaasioŋ yi ci base de done yu am réputation cloud ba noppi di la artu balaa ngay def ay executable yuñu xamul. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_Autoplay: Dafay saytu ndax Windows dafay ubbi ci saasi ab laaj wala dafay tàmbali ab aplikaasioŋ soo dugalee benn lecteur USB wala yeneen media yuñ mëna dindi.
TweakWhy_AutoRebootOnCrash: Su Windows daanu (ekraŋ bu baxa), mën na tàmbaliwaat ci saasi. Defar njuumte bi dafay wéy di feeñ ci ekraŋ bi suko defee nga mëna jàng kodu arrêt bi.
TweakWhy_BackgroundApps: Saytu ndax app yi mën nañu dox ak yeesal ci ginaaw sudee nekkul ci focus bi. Deactivate dafay denc CPU ak mémoire. Lii coppite bu am risk la, te mën na nekk lu jafe wala lu jafe ñu delloo ko.
TweakWhy_BingSearch: Boxu seetug Mënu Tàmbali bi mën na wane njariñu web Bing ci wetu njariñu dëkk bi. Deactivate dafay tax seetug Menu Tàmbali bi nekk ci gox bi kese.
TweakWhy_BootRecovery: Dafay saytu ndax Windows dafay dugg ci saasi ci mode recuperation ginaaw bimu jéemee tàmbali def ay yoon yu toppalante te jàllul. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_BraveDebloat: Defa def ay xéewali navigateur Brave yuñ mëna tànn: neexal, portefeylu kripto, VPN, ak waxtaan IA. Du am njeexital ci yii man-mani Brave kese, du am njeexital ci sa nawigaasioŋ. Lii coppite bu am risk la, te mën na nekk lu jafe wala lu jafe ñu delloo ko.
TweakWhy_BSoDStopError: Dafay wane kodu njuumte bi ci ekraŋ bu baxa bu dee bi, du emoji kanam gu naqar gi.
TweakWhy_BuildNumberOnDesktop: Dafay wane nimero taaxum Windows ak edition bi ni filigran ci koñu ndeyjoor ci suufu sa biro.
TweakWhy_CABInstallContext: Yokk tànneef samp ci mënu kontekstu klike ci ndeyjoor ngir fichier archive .cab.
TweakWhy_Camera: Master toggle mooy saytu ndax app yi mën nañu laaj jëfandikoo sa kamera. Deactivate app yépp duñu mëna jëfandikoo kameraa bi. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_CapsLock: Dafay saytu ndax butoŋu Caps Lock bi dafa tàmbali. Desactiver remaps butoŋu Caps Lock kon tëye ko du def dara.
TweakWhy_ChangingSoundScheme: Dafay saytu ndax jëfandikukat yi mën nañu soppi anamu sonu Windows. Soo dese lii, dafay tëju xeetu liggéey bi fi nekk, te dina tere coppite.
TweakWhy_CheckBoxes: Dafay wane ay kaare yu ndaw ci wetu fichier yi ak dossier yi ci Explorer ngir yombal tànneef yu bari te doo tëye Ctrl.
TweakWhy_CheckWinGet: WinGet mooy njiitu kofre yiñ tabax ci biir Windows, ñu koy jëfandikoo ngir samp ak yeesal aplikaasioŋ yi ci liiñ komand bi. Loolu dafay tax mu mëna ànd ak jamono.
TweakWhy_CIMemoryIntegrity: Kodu njubte giñ aaree ci hyperviseur dafay doxal kodu kernel Windows ci environmaa buñ virtualisee ngir moytu xeetu loraange bu nekk ci kernel bi ak rootkit yi. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_ClearRecentFiles: Saa yoo génnee ci net bi, dafay dindi ci saasi limu fichier yi mujjee am. Dafay gëna suqaliku ci masin yuñ bokk wala yu bari jëfandikukat.
TweakWhy_ClipboardHistory: Dafay denc jaar-jaaru mbir yiñ kopie suko defee nga mëna jëfandikoo Win+V ngir jëfandikoo clip yu njëkk yi. Aktiwal ngir taal man-man bii.
TweakWhy_CompressedFolderNewContext: Dafay wane wala nëbb tànneef Dosier buñ komprime (zip) ci klike ci ndeyjoor ci mënu bu bees bi ci Explorateur de fichier.
TweakWhy_ConnectionSharing: Dafay may PC bi mu séddoo lëkkaloo internetam ak yeneen aparey, muy nekk hotspot losisel. Aktiwise dafay wane tànneef bii ci jekkal reso bi. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_ControlPanelView: Defar xeetu feeñte biñ jagleel Panelu Kontrol ci Ikoon yu Mag, Ikoon yu ndaw, wala grupu Kategori biñ jagleel.
TweakWhy_Copilot: Dindi Copilot, Rappel, ak bépp cër bu jëm ci Windows AI. Soo bëggee sampaat fàww nga am winget wala Màngasiinu Microsoft.
TweakWhy_CortanaAutostart: Dafay tere Cortana tàmbali tàmbali ci saasi. Ba leegi mën nga ubbi Cortana ak loxo su ko soxlaa.
TweakWhy_CreateRestorePoint: Sosal barabu defaraat sistemu Windows suko defee nga mëna delloosi coppite yi am ci sistem bi su amee lu jaarul yoon. Dina ñu la xelal balaa ngay def benn coppite.
TweakWhy_CrossDeviceResume: Daf lay may nga tàmbaliwaat say liggéey ci yeneen jumtukaayi Windows ci PC bii jaaraleko ci ab yëgle buy jameet. Dekkal sudee jëfandikoowoo man-manu aparey yu bari yii.
TweakWhy_CurrentNetwork: Defar profilu reso bi ci sa lëkkaloo bi fi nekk. Privé dafay tax ñu mëna gis ak séddoo reso bi, Public daf koy tënk. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_DefaultTerminalApp: Defar ban aplikaasioŋ terminal mooy ubbeeku soo ubbee Prompt Komànd wala PowerShell ci biir Windows.
TweakWhy_DefenderAppGuard: Ubbi onglet navigateur Edge ci masin virtuel buñ tàqale ngir tere sitweb yu bonn yi dugg ci sistem biy jëfandikoo wala ay fichier yi. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_DefenderCloud: May aaru Microsoft Defender bu sukkandiko ci niir ngir seetlu jafe-jafe yi ci jamono dëgg, jëfandikoo base de done yu Microsoft yiy saytu jafe-jafe yi ci àdduna bi. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_DefenderSandbox: Dafay doxal motër antivirus bu Microsoft Defender ci biir benn boyet buñ tàqale ngir am kaaraange gu gëna mag. Dafay yokk tuuti ci njëgu performance. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_DefenderTrayIcon: Dafay wane wala nëbb ikonu Kaaraange Windows (Defender) ci tegukaayu sistem bi. Soo ko nëbbee du dindi aaru Defender.
TweakWhy_DeliveryOptimization: Windows mën na jëfandikoo sa PC ngir séddoo done yiñ yebbi ci Windows Update ak yeneen PC yi ci sa reso wala ci net bi. Soo dese yebbi, sa telesarse dafay nekk ci nëbbëtu. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_DEPOptOut: Defar Faggu Jëfandikoo Done ci anam OptOut, may aaru DEP ci bépp liggéey ludul ci yi nga dindi ci anam wu leer. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_DiagnosticDataLevel: Dafay saytu bariwaayu done yiy saytu Windows di yónnee Microsoft. Minimal du yónnee lenn ludul leerali aparey bi ak done yu wóor yi.
TweakWhy_DiagTrackService: Cëru DiagTrack dafay dajale ba noppi yebbi done yiy jëfandikoo Windows ak saytu ci serwëru Microsoft yi. Soo ko deactivé dafay taxawal yebbi telemetry ci ginaaw. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_DisableAESCiphers: Dafay dindi duggal cifer AES yu yàgg yi ci wàllu kaaraange Windows SCHANNEL. Dafay forse aplikaasioŋ yi ñu waxtaan ak configurations cipher yu gëna am doole. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_DisableAutoRun: Dafay tere Windows tàmbali prograam ci saasi ci disk USB yi ak ci yeneen media yuñ mëna dindi. Dafay taxawal vecteur buy tasaaroo xeetu loraange bu bari.
TweakWhy_DisableHashAlgorithms: Taxawal jekkal algorithm hash SCHANNEL. Deactivé MD5 ak may algorithm famiy SHA ngir gëna dëgëral njub. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_DisableIPv6: Defaral stack protokol IPv6 ci sistem bi yépp. Dañu lay digal nga jëfandikoo ko sudee sa reso jëfandikoowul IPv6 ngir wàññi surface attaque bu amul njariñ. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_DisableRC2RC4Ciphers: Deactivé cifre RC2 ak RC4 ci CHANNEL. Algorithm yooyu dañu yàqu ci wàllu kriptografi te waru ñu leen jëfandikoo ci benn lëkkaloo TLS. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_DisableRemoteCommands: DCOM ab protokolu aktivaasioŋ bu sori la bu jumtukaayi doxal liggéeyukaay bi di soxla (SCCM, WMI). Soo ko deactivé dafay wàññi surface attaque bi waaye mën na dog workflow management bi sori.
TweakWhy_DisableSMBv3Compression: Dafay fay SMB ngir aar ci CVE-2020-0796. Dafay am njeexital ci kompresioŋ trafik SMB kese, du am njeexital ci gaawaayu jëfandikoo fichier. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_DisableTCPTimestamps: Dindi leerali timestamp TCP ci paketu reso bi. Dafay tere sistem yu sori yi am emprent sa OS ci waxtu liggéey bi. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_DisableTripleDESCipher: Def ñatti DES (3DES) ci CHANNEL. 3DES mën nañu ko song ci aniwerseer SWEET32 te leegi wóorul dara. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_DiskCleanup: Dafay doxal jumtukaayu Windows Disk Cleanup biñ tabax ngir dindi fichier yiy yàggul dara, cache sistem bi, ak yeneen done yu soxlawul ngir dindi palaas ci disk bi. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_DismissMSAccount: Dindi lay laaj bu bari ci Kaaraange Windows di la sàkku nga dugg ci sàqum Microsoft ngir am yeneen aar.
TweakWhy_DismissSmartScreenFilter: Dindi na laaj biy baaxoo am ci Kaaraange Windows di sàkku ci yaw nga amaale filtre réputation SmartScreen.
TweakWhy_DNSoverHTTPS: Dafay encrypter seetlu DNS ci yónnee leen ci HTTPS ci barabu UDP bu leer. Dafay tere sa ISP wala reso bi di saytu wala di soppali trafik DNS bi. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_DownloadBlocking: Dafay saytu ndax Kaaraange Windows dafay màrke fichier yiñ yebbi ni mën nañu nekk lu wóorul ci jëfandikoo Zone.Identifier ci done yu wuute.
TweakWhy_EdgeDebloat: Jëfandikool jekkal Politigu Grupp ngir dindi telemetri, assistant jënd, dajale, Copilot bar sidebar, ak yeneen Edge yuñ mëna tànn. Lii coppite bu am risk la, te mën na nekk lu jafe wala lu jafe ñu delloo ko.
TweakWhy_EditWithClipchampContext: Dafay wane wala nëbb tànneef Soppi ak Clipchamp editëru wideo ci mënu kontekstu klike ci ndeyjoor ngir fichier wideo.
TweakWhy_EditWithPaintContext: Dafay wane wala nëbb tànneef Soppi ak Pentiir ci mënu kontekstu klike ci ndeyjoor ngir fichier nataal yi.
TweakWhy_EditWithPhotosContext: Dafay wane wala nëbb tànneef Soppi ak Nataal yi ci mënu kontekstu klike ci ndeyjoor ngir fichier nataal yi.
TweakWhy_EnableBiometricsAntiSpoofing: Dafay may Windows Hello mu mëna xàmmee kanam gi. Du am solo sudee am nga aparey biometrik bu méngoo.
TweakWhy_EnableSMBGuestCompatibility: Dafay may lëkkaloo SMB yi ci séddoo reso te soxlawul xamle. Dañu ko soxla ngir mëna jëfandikoo aparey NAS yu yàgg yi, imprimante yi wala routeur yi. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_EncCompFilesColor: Dafay wane fichier encrypté ci wert ak fichier yuñ komprime ci baxa ci File Explorer. Dafay tax ñu mëna xàmmee xeetu fichier yii ci saasi.
TweakWhy_EnhPointerPrecision: Gaawaayu jinéef biy yamale gaawaayu kursoer bi méngoo ak ni ngay toxalee jinéef ji ci sa yaram. Desactivé ngir dugal jiné bu ñor bu dëppoo, ñu ngi ko digal ngir jeu video.
TweakWhy_ErrorReporting: Su benn aplikaasioŋ daanu, Rapor Njuumte Windows mën na yónnee Microsoft rapoor. Soo ko deactivé dafay tere done yii génn ci sa masin.
TweakWhy_EventViewerCustomView: Sosal gis-gis buñ personaaliseer ci Event Viewer buñ segg ngir wane xew-xewu sos liggéey, suko defee mu gëna yombal xool prograam yiñ tàmbali.
TweakWhy_ExplorerAutoDiscovery: Fichier Explorer dafay gis xeetu ëmbiitu dosiye bu nekk ba noppi jëfandikoo ab formu xool bu méngoo. Deactivate dafay tëju bépp dossier ci gis-gis bu méngoo.
TweakWhy_ExplorerTitleFullPath: Dafay wane yoonu dosiye bi yépp ci barabu titre Explorer Fichier, du turu dosiye bi kese. Dina am njariñ sooy liggéey ak dosiye yu bari yu am benn tur.
TweakWhy_F1HelpPage: Soo bësee F1 ci File Explorer wala ci sa biro, dafay ubbi sitwebu ndimbalu Windows ci sa nawigatër. Deactivate dafay tere navigateur bi tàmbali.
TweakWhy_F8BootMenu: Aktiwise mënu démarrage butoŋu F8 bi lay may nga tànn Mode Safe ak yeneen tànneef ci tàmbali bi Windows di tàmbali.
TweakWhy_FastStartup: Mode tëjug hybrid buy denc tolluwaayu kernel bi ci disk bi suko defee Windows di gaawa tàmbali. Mën na indi jafe-jafe ci tabb dual-boot wala tëj lépp.
TweakWhy_FeedbackFrequency: Dafay saytu ñaata yoon la Windows di laaj nga joxe poñ ci sa jaar-jaar wala nga joxe say xalaat. Reglage ci Musul taxawal bépp feedback buy laaj.
TweakWhy_FileDeleteConfirm: Dafay wane dialog firnde laata ngay efaase benn fichier ba fàww. Aktiwiseel ngir am ab laaj balaa ñuy yónnee fichier yi ci Pañu rësiklaas bi.
TweakWhy_FileExplorerCompactMode: Wàññi diggante mbir yi ci File Explorer ngir gis limu mbir yi gëna dëgër, gëna bari leeral.
TweakWhy_FileExtensions: Dafay wane extension fichier bi (lu melni .txt, .exe) ginaaw bépp tur fichier ci Explorer. Dina la jàppale nga xàmmee xeetu fichier bi ci saasi.
TweakWhy_FileOperationsDetails: Dafay wane dialog bi leer ci yokkute yi ci jëfandikoo fichier yi (kopie, toxal, efaase) ci default ci barabu barabu yokkute bi gëna ndaw.
TweakWhy_FileTransferDialog: Dafay saytu ndax dialog kopie ak toxal fichier dafay wane leeral yu mat sëkk yu melni gaawaay ak waxtu wi des ci default.
TweakWhy_Firewall: Aktiwal wala dellu ginaaw pare-feu Windows Defender ci bépp profil reso. Deactivate dafay bàyyi bépp port buy dugg te kenn duko filtre. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_FirstLogonAnimation: Dafay wane ab animaasioŋ bu gàtt ngir dalal nit ñi ak ekraŋ Hi bi ngay njëkka dugg ginaaw yeesali Windows bu mag.
TweakWhy_FldrSeparateProcess: Ubbi palanteer bu nekk ci dosiye Explorer ci anam wumu mëna doon. Su benn ci ñoom daanu, ñeneen ñi dañuy des ubbeeku. Dafay jëfandikoo memory bu gëna bari tuuti.
TweakWhy_FolderGroupBy: Dafay saytu ndax fichier yi ci dosiye Yebbi yi dañu leen boole ci bis biñ soppee. Reglage ci Amul dafay wane fichier yépp ci limu plat.
TweakWhy_FullscreenOptimizations: Man-manu Windows buy gëna baaxal jeu yi ak app yiy daw ci mode ekraŋ bu mat ngir gëna mëna liggéey. Soo ko defee mën na saafara jafe-jafe yi ci yenn jeu yu yàgg yi.
TweakWhy_GameDVR: Enregistrement ci ginaaw dafay wéy di kapte gameplay bi suko defee nga mëna denc simili yu mujj yi ginaaw bi dara xewee. Deactivate dafay dindi GPU ak jumtukaayi disk ngir gëna dëppoo FPS.
TweakWhy_GPUScheduling: Jamonoy GPU bu gaaw ci hardware bi dafay may GPU bi mu yor boppam ci mémoire wideo bi ci saasi, te loolu mën na wàññi latency bi ci biir jeu yi.
TweakWhy_Hibernation: Dafay denc lépp lu nekk ci RAM bi ci disk bi ba noppi dindi PC bi bamu jeex. Fichier hibernation bi mën na jëfandikoo ay gigabyte ci disk bi.
TweakWhy_HiddenItems: Dafay wane fichier yi ak dosiye yiñ màrkee ni dañu nëbbu ci File Explorer. Mbir yiñ nëbb dañuy leer tuuti suñu leen gisee.
TweakWhy_HomeGroups: Home Groups man-manu Windows la woon ngir séddoo ay fichier ci diggante PC yi ci kër yi. Dindi nañu ko ci Windows 10 1803 waaye mën nañu des ci sarwis yi.
TweakWhy_ImportExploitProtectionPolicy: Yebbi ak indi ab fichier politiku wàññi njaayum buñu tabax bu njëkk ci Windows Defender Exploit Guard, di jëfandikoo ay wàññikaayu doxalin yuñ personaalise bu baax. Lii coppite bu am risk la, te mën na nekk lu jafe wala lu jafe ñu delloo ko.
TweakWhy_InputMethod: Defar anam wi Windows di jëfandikoo ngir dugal ci klaweer bi. Àngle dafay forse xeetu Àngle ak yeneen làkk yiñ samp.
TweakWhy_JPEGWallpapersQuality: Windows dafay kompresse fond d'écran JPEG yi soo leen defee ñu nekk fondu biro bi. Regler ci Max dafay baña yàq kalite nataal bi yépp.
TweakWhy_LanguageListAccess: Mayna sitweb yi ñu jàng sa limu tànneefi làkku Windows ngir méngale ëmbiit li. Def ko ngir tere sitweb yi gis say jekkal làkk.
TweakWhy_LanmanWorkstationGuestAuthPolic: Njàngat gan ngir SMB vecteur latéral-mouvement buñu xamee la buñu deactivé ci Windows 10 1709. Soo ko amalee dafay wane sistem bi ci jëfandikoo SMB buñu xamul. Aktiwiseel ko ngir dëppoo ak aparey yu yàgg yi kese.
TweakWhy_LatestInstalled.NET: Dafay forse aplikaasioŋu 32-bit ak 64-bit ñu jëfandikoo .NET runtime biñ gëna yeesal ci barabu bi ñu leen njëkka tabax.
TweakWhy_LLMNR: Link-Local Multicast Tur Resolution dafay saafara tur host yi ci reso lokal yi. Mën nañu ko jëfandikoo ngir jàpp ay gëm-gëm, te li gën mooy ñu dindi ko. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_LocalSecurityAuthority: Dafay doxal Windows LSA ci anam wu aar ngir moytu jumtukaay yu melni Mimikatz sàcc ay santaane. Dina ñu ko digal ci sistem yépp. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_LocationService: Dafay saytu ndax aplikaasioŋ yi mën nañu jëfandikoo barabu sa aparey. Deactivate dafay tere aplikaasioŋ yépp toppu barab bi. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_LockScreen: Dafay saytu ndax ekraŋu tëjug Windows bi dafay feeñ laata ekraŋu dugg ci Windows 11.
TweakWhy_LockScreenBlur: Defal ab efekt flou acrylic ci lëndëmu ekraŋu dugg bi. Desactiver dafay wane fon bi te du flou.
TweakWhy_LockScreenRS1: Dafay saytu ndax ekraŋu tëjug Windows bi dafay feeñ laataa ekraŋu dugg ci Windows 10 (yoonu sàrtu jamonoy RS1).
TweakWhy_LockWidgets: Pack Expérience Web Windows dafay yokk ay widget ak ëmbiit buy soppiku ci ekraŋu tëjug bi ak baraabu liggéey bi. Deactivate dafay dindi yii.
TweakWhy_MaintenanceWakeUp: Windows mën na yee sa ordinatër ci nelaw ci guddi gi ngir def ay liggéeyu maintenance ci saa si. Desactiver dafay moytu yeewu guddi gi nga bëggul.
TweakWhy_MapUpdates: Windows Maps mën na yebbi ci saasi done yu yeesal yi ci ginaaw. Soo jëfandikoowul aplikaasioŋu Maps, dangay sakkanal yaatuwaayu bandwidth bi.
TweakWhy_MeetNow: Dajeel leegi ikonu ci barabu yëgle bi
TweakWhy_MergeConflicts: Dafay wane àrtu sooy boole dosiye yu am fichier yu am benn tur. Deactivé ngir soppi fichier yi ci ab noppalu te doo laaj.
TweakWhy_Microphone: Master toggle ngir saytu ndax app yi mën nañu laaj jëfandikoo sa mikro. Deactivate app yépp duñu mëna jëfandikoo mikro bi. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_MostUsedApps: Dafay wane sa aplikaasioŋ yi nga gëna faral di ubbi ci kaw limu aplikaasioŋu Mënu Tàmbali ngir gaaw ci jëfandikoo.
TweakWhy_MostUsedStartApps: App yiñ gëna jëfandikoo ci Tàmbali
TweakWhy_MouseAcceleration: Yokkatal Pointer Dafay natt tànki jinéef ci gaawaay. Desactiver dafay joxe 1:1 raw input ratio bi joueur FPS yi taamu ngir am mébet bu méngoo.
TweakWhy_MSIExtractContext: Yokk tànneef Extrait ci mënu kontekstu klike ci ndeyjoor ngir fichier instalatëru .msi, loolu dina tax nga mëna xool seen ëmbiit te doo doxal instalatër bi.
TweakWhy_MSNetClient: Kiliyaan Reseau Microsoft biy may PC bii mu mëna jëfandikoo fichier yi ak imprimante yi yeneen ordinatëri Windows yi ci reso bi bokk. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_MultiplaneOverlay: Man-manu composite GPU bu mëna yokk performance. Deactivation mën na saafara jafe-jafe yi ci yenn configurations yi.
TweakWhy_MultipleInvokeContext: Soo tànnee 15 fichier wala lu ëpp ba noppi nga bës ci ndeyjoor, Windows dafay faral di wane àrtu laata muy wane mënu kontekst bi. Loolu dafay yokk wala dindi àpp boobu.
TweakWhy_NaglesAlgorithm: Dafay wàññi tampon reso bi suko defee ñu mëna yónnee paket yi ci saasi. Mën na wàññi latency ci multiplayer biy joŋante, waaye mën na indi jafe-jafe ci stabilite lëkkaloo ci yenn reso yi. Deactivé sudee gis nga conexion bi daanu.
TweakWhy_NavigationPaneExpand: Panelu jubluwaayu Explorer bi dafay yaatu ci saasi ba noppi di dem ngir tegalal dosiye bi ngay xool fi mu nekk.
TweakWhy_NavPaneAllFolders: Dafay wane bépp dosiye lokal boole ci dosiye sistem yu nëbbu yi ci paanelu navigaasioŋ bu cammoy Explorer bi.
TweakWhy_NavPaneLibraries: Dafay wane wàllu Bibliothèques (Dokument, Music, Nataal, Wideo) ci paanelu navigation bu cammoy Explorer bi.
TweakWhy_NCSIProbe: Màndarga tolluwaayu lëkkaloo ci reso bi dafay saytu lëkkaloo bi ci def ping ci serwëru Microsoft yi. Defar mën na wane ikonu tolluwaayu reso bu jaarul yoon. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_NetBIOS: NetBIOS ab protokol bu yàgg la buñuy jëfandikoo ngir séddoo fichier Windows. Def ci reso yu bees yi dafay wàññi trafik diffusion bu amul njariñ. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_NetDevicesAutoInst: Dafay saytu ndax Windows dafay yebbi ci saasi ba noppi samp dawalkat yi ci juntuwaayu reso bu bees bi.
TweakWhy_NetworkAdaptersSavePower: Dafay may Windows mu def adaptatëru reso bi ci anam wu néew doole su nekkee ci inactif. Deactivate dafay moytu yeexal lëkkaloowaat ci diir bu gàtt ginaaw bi adaptatër bi yewwoo.
TweakWhy_NetworkDiscovery: May PC bii mu gis yeneen aparey ci reso bi la nekk, ñu mën ko gis. Dafay am solo ngir seet reso buñ séddoo ci File Explorer. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_NetworkFromLockScreen: Dafay saytu ndax butoŋu tànneef reso bi dafay feeñ ci ekraŋu tëjug bi laataa jëfandikukat bi di dugg.
TweakWhy_NetworkProtection: Aaru reso bu Microsoft Defender dafay tere lëkkaloo yi ak domen yu am loraange yuñ xamee ak adres IP yi ci wàllu reso bi. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_NewAppPrompt: Sooy jéema ubbi xeetu fichier bu amul benn lëkkaloo, Windows dafay wane dialog buy laaj ni ñu koy ubbee. Desactiver dafay dindi laaj bii.
TweakWhy_NewOutlook: Saytu ndax aplikaasioŋu Outlook bu bees bi jàppandi na. Def leen ngir wéy di jëfandikoo aplikaasioŋu Mail ak Calendar yi.
TweakWhy_NewsInterests: Xibaar yi ak ëmbiitu meteo bi ci baraabu liggéey bi
TweakWhy_Notifications: Commutateur bu mag ngir sistemu yëgle Windows bi yépp. Deactivate dafay taxawal bépp yëgle app ba noppi nëbb santaru yëgle bi. Lii coppite bu am risk la, te mën na nekk lu jafe wala lu jafe ñu delloo ko.
TweakWhy_NTFSLastAccess: Dafay yeesal timestamp ci bépp fichier saa yu ñu ko jàngee. Deactivate dafay wàññi bind disk ci sistem yu bari fichier yu ndaw yuñ lire.
TweakWhy_NTFSLongPaths: Dindi na àppu 260 araf ci yooni fichier yi. Dañu ko soxla ci yenn jumtukaayi developpement ak jumtukaayi dosiye yu xóot.
TweakWhy_NumLock: Dafay saytu ndax butoŋu Num Lock bi dafay taal ci saasi su Windows tàmbalee. Aktiwise ngir tàmbali saa yu nekk ak pad nimero biy dox.
TweakWhy_OneDrive: Dafa samp OneDrive desktop sync client, walla dindi app bi ak Explorer integration bi. Uninstall bi dafay processus bu dindi package, du toggle bu woyof — bu demee fekk am na soppi sëtu ak dugg sign-in ak xaar ba sync bi dellu.
TweakWhy_OneDriveFileExplorerAd: OneDrive dafay wane yëgle buy yëgle ci biir File Explorer di la ñaax nga senkronise fichier yi. nëbb dafay dindi banner bii.
TweakWhy_OpenFileExplorerTo: Defar barab bi Fichier Explorer di ubbeeku suñu ko ubbee ci baraabu liggéey bi wala Mënu Tàmbali bi.
TweakWhy_PerformanceTuning: Dafay doxal ay coppite ci sistem yu yàgg yi ak defar tabb tàmbali ngir gëna baaxal tontub sistem bi. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_PowerPlan: Defar palaŋu doole Windows. Performance balance bu ekilibre bu sukkandiko ci sargal. Performance bu kawe dafay tax CPU bi nekk ci gaawaay gu mat sëkk. Ultimate Performance dafay dindi bépp gaz buy sakkanal kuuraŋ ngir mëna dem bu baax. Mën na am Performance bu mujjee nekkul ci sistem yépp.
TweakWhy_Powershell7Telemetry: PowerShell 7 dafay yónnee Microsoft done yuñ jëfandikoo ci anam wu nëbbu. Desactiver dafay dindi telemetry bii. Lëkkaloo ak tànneef Sampal/Yeesal PowerShell 7.
TweakWhy_PowerShellModulesLogging: Dafay dugal bépp ndigal bu modle PowerShell yi doxal ci journal xew-xewu Windows. Amna njariñ ci saytu kaaraange ak amal lànket ci jafe-jafe yi.
TweakWhy_PowerShellScriptsLogging: Dafay dugal ëmbiit li yépp ci bépp bloku skript PowerShell buy dox ci log xew-xewu Windows. Dina jàppale ci amal lànket ginaaw musiba.
TweakWhy_PreventEdgeShortcutCreation: Dafay tere Microsoft Edge defaraat gaawaayu biro bi ginaaw yeesali bi. Dafay wax ci bépp chaine buy génne Edge.
TweakWhy_PrintCMDContext: Dafay wane wala nëbb tànneef Imprimeer ci mënu kontekst bu ndeyjoor ngir fichier script .bat ak .cmd.
TweakWhy_ProtectClickOnce: Defar ClickOnce wóolu laaj ngir bépp zone de sécurité. Dafay tere aplikaasioŋu ClickOnce yiñ wóolu ñu laaj instalaasioŋ. Lii coppite bu am risk la, te mën na nekk lu jafe wala lu jafe ñu delloo ko.
TweakWhy_ProtectFileSystemPerformance: Defar 8.3 tur fichier bu gàtt ci NTFS. Dafay gëna suqali sistemu fichier bi ba noppi dindi man-mani deggoo bu yàgg bi ñu bariwul luñu koy soxla tay.
TweakWhy_ProtectMSOffice: Dafay tënk macro yi, jëfandikoo ëmbiit li ci biti, ak jekkal wóolu Outlook ci bépp xeetu Office. Wàññi vecteur attaque yi lalu ci këyit. Lii coppite bu am risk la, te mën na nekk lu jafe wala lu jafe ñu delloo ko.
TweakWhy_ProtectMSOfficeLinks: Dafay tere Word yeesal ci saasi lëkkalekaay yi ci biti ci këyit yi ak imeel yi. Wàññi risku exfiltration done jaaraleko ci lëkkalekaay yuñ samp ci këyit. Lii coppite bu am risk la, te mën na nekk lu jafe wala lu jafe ñu delloo ko.
TweakWhy_ProtectOS: Dafay jëfandikoo xeetu valeur yu bari yuy dëgëral registry biy muur aaru santaane, UAC, NTLM, TCP/IP, ak jeffin juy dindi kàrt inteligent. Lii coppite bu am risk la, te mën na nekk lu jafe wala lu jafe ñu delloo ko.
TweakWhy_ProtectRPCSurface: Deactivé RPC-over-TCP ngir Programmeur de Task ak Responsable de Contrôle des Services à distance. Wàññi exposition ngir yooni attaque yu sori. Lii coppite bu am risk la, te mën na nekk lu jafe wala lu jafe ñu delloo ko.
TweakWhy_ProtectWinRM: Deactivé trafic WinRM buñu encrypté ak gëmloo digest, ba noppi tàmbaliwaat serwiisu WinRM. Fexe ba lëkkaloo yi yor ci fu sori dañuy encrypté saa yu nekk. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_PrtScnSnippingTool: Dafay tax butoŋu Ekraŋ Imprime bi ubbi Jumtukaayu Dagg ngir jàpp ekraŋ bi ci barabu kopie ci clipboard bi ci noppi.
TweakWhy_PUAppsDetection: Dafay may Defender mu gis ak beddi aplikaasioŋ yiñ bëggul lu ci melni adware, bundleware ak ñiy xajamal navigateur yi. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_QoS: Kalite Serwiis bi mën na tànn yenn xeeti trafik ci reso bi. Dafay am solo ngir yenn man-mani QoS ci reso bi mëna dox bu baax.
TweakWhy_QuickAccessFrequentFolders: Wàll wi tuddu Accès rapide ci Explorer mën na wane dosiye yi ngay faral di dem. Nébb ngir Quick Access du wane lenn ludul say dosiye yuñ tënk.
TweakWhy_QuickAccessRecentFiles: Wàll wi tuddu Accès rapide ci Explorer mën na wane fichier yiñ sooga ubbi. Nébb ngir Quick Access du wane lenn ludul say dosiye yuñ tënk.
TweakWhy_RazerBlock: Dafay tere skriptu instalatëru Razer Synapse dox ci saasi. Dafay tere ñu samp losisel Razer bi nga bëggul ci ginaaw. Lii coppite bu am risk la, te mën na nekk lu jafe wala lu jafe ñu delloo ko.
TweakWhy_RecentFiles: Dafay saytu ndax Windows dafay topp fichier yi nga jota jëfandikoo ngir wane leen ci dialog Accès gaaw ak Open. Def ngir dakkal topp bii.
TweakWhy_RecentlyAddedApps: Dafay wane limu aplikaasioŋ yiñ sooga samp ci Mënu Tàmbali bi. Defar limu aplikaasioŋu Mënu Tàmbali bi gëna set.
TweakWhy_RecentlyAddedStartApps: App yiñ jota yokk ci Tàmbali
TweakWhy_RecentShortcuts: Dafay wane fichier yi ak dosiye yi ñuy jëfandikoo bu yàggul ak yi ñuy faral di jëfandikoo ci wàllu Gaawaay ci Explorer.
TweakWhy_RecommendedTroubleshooting: Dafay saytu ndax Windows dafay doxal ci saasi ay saafara jafe-jafe suñu gisee jafe-jafe. Default mingi wéy di sàkku sa ndigal balaa muy daw.
TweakWhy_RecycleBinDeleteConfirmation: Dafay wane ab laaj firnde balaa ngay toxal fichier yi ci Pañe rësiklaas bi. Aktiwise ngir moytu ñu efaase ci anam wu jaarul yoon.
TweakWhy_RegistryBackup: Dafay tax ñu mëna sakkanal fichier hive registry Windows yi ci dosiye RegBack bi ci biir répertoire Windows bi.
TweakWhy_RepairSharedPrinterConnectionEr: Dafay saafara jafe-jafe yiy faral di am ci lëkkaloog imprimante ci wàllu host ak kiliyaan ci méngale RPC, SMB, Point ak Imprimeer, spooler, TCP, ak jekkal gis reso bi. Coppite bi amna risk bu yam te fàww nga tàmbaliwaat ko.
TweakWhy_RepairWindows11SMBUpdateIssue: Fix ab jafe-jafe buñu xamoon ci yenn Windows 11 tabax fu SMB séddoo jëfandikoo mënul am ginaaw benn yeesal ndax benn valeur registry bu ñàkk.
TweakWhy_ReservedStorage: Windows dafay denc ay gigabyte yu bari ci disk ngir yeesal, fichier yuy yàgg ak ay cache. Desactiver dafay jëlaat palaas biñ denc ginaaw yeesal bi ci topp. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_RestartDeviceAfterUpdate: Dafay may Windows mu mëna tàmbaliwaat ci nimu gëna gaawe ginaaw bimu defee instalaasioŋ bu yeesal.
TweakWhy_RestartNotification: Dafay wane ab yëgle ci baraabu liggéey yi suñu sampalee ab yeesal Windows te dafay laaj tàmbaliwaat ngir mëna jeex.
TweakWhy_RestoreFldrWindows: Ubbiwaat bépp palanteer dosiye Explorer bu ubbeekuwoon bi nga mujjee génn. Delloosi sa contexte liggéey ci bépp dugg.
TweakWhy_RevertStartMenu: Delloosi Mënu Tàmbali bi ci jëmmu 24H2 bi njëkk ci Windows 11 24H2 tabax. Mën na indi jafe-jafe ci deggoo gi ak yeesali Windows yi ci kanam. Lii coppite bu am risk la, te mën na nekk lu jafe wala lu jafe ñu delloo ko.
TweakWhy_S3Sleep: S3 mooy nelaw bu xóot biñ baaxoo xam, foofu la PC bi di dindi bépp komposant. Yenn sistem yi deñuy tëral Modern Standby bi mën na dindi kuuraŋ biñu nekkee ci ralenti.
TweakWhy_SaveRestartableApps: Windows mën na denc tolluwaayu aplikaasioŋ yi ubbeeku soo génnee, ba noppi ubbiwaat leen ci saasi ginaaw bi nga duggee ci beneen yoon.
TweakWhy_SaveZoneInformation: Soo yebbisee benn fichier ci net bi, Windows daf koy etikete ak màrku zone. Sooy tëye lii, dafay may àrtu kaaraange yi sooy doxal fichier yiñ yebbi.
TweakWhy_ScheduledTasks: Barina liggéey yuñ nara def ci ginaaw ngir dajale ak yebbi ay done diagnostic. Deactivate dafay tax liggéey yooyu duñu dox ci saasi. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_SearchAppInStore: Soo ubbee benn fichier bu am extension buñu xamul, Windows mën nala digal nga seet ko ci Màngasiinu Microsoft bi. Desactiver dafay salte xalaat bii.
TweakWhy_SearchHighlights: Seetug mbir yu am solo ci Seetug Windows
TweakWhy_SecondsInSystemClock: Segond yi ci bar liggéey bi
TweakWhy_SelectCheckboxes: Yokk ay boyet ci wetu fichier yi ak dossier yi ci Explorer ngir yombal tànneef yu bari te doo tëye Ctrl.
TweakWhy_Sensors: Dafay tàggat accès ci sensor yu hardware ni accelerometer, gyroscope ak sensor bu leeru àdduna. Lii ëpp solo ci tablette ak cihaz yu ñu mën a wéttali.
TweakWhy_ServicesManual: Defar tànneef ci sarwis Windows yi amul njariñ, daale ko ci tàmbali otomatik dem ci tàmbali loxo. Dina ñu tàmbali liggéey yi suñu ko soxlaa. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_SetDefenderExploitGuardPolicy: Dafay jëfandikoo yeneen sàrti wàññi surfaasu songu Exploit Guard jaaraleko ci Windows Defender ngir tere pexe xeetu loraange yu bari. Lii coppite bu am risk la, te mën na nekk lu jafe wala lu jafe ñu delloo ko.
TweakWhy_SetDLLHijackingPrevention: Taxawal seetug DLL Session Manager ngir tere aplikaasioŋ yi yobbu DLL ci barab yuñu wóoluwul. Dafay tëj yoonu joxeg xeetu loraange bu bari. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_SetLOLBinFirewallRules: Yokk ay sàrti bloke firewall ngir binaire Windows yiñ tabax ci biir, te xeetu loraange bu bari (LOLBins) di yàq ci telefon bi ci kër gi wala ngir yebbi ay payload. Lii coppite bu am risk la, te mën na nekk lu jafe wala lu jafe ñu delloo ko.
TweakWhy_SetNtpServerOverride: Dafay soppi waxtu Windows ngir jëfandikoo pool.ntp.org ci barabu serwëru waxtu Windows biñ jagleel.
TweakWhy_SetSMBSharingCompatibility: Dafay denc sa tabb SMB bi fi nekk ak sa santaane reso biñ denc suñu defee yeneen coppite ci reso bi. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_SettingsSuggestedContent: Aplikaasioŋu Jekkal yi mën na wane xalaat ak xelal yuñ parraine ci wetu say jekkal. Nebb dafay dindi ëmbiitu fësal bii.
TweakWhy_SetWindowsFirewallLogging: Dafay may ñu dugal lëkkaloo yiñ daaneel ak yiñ nangu ci fichier log Windows Firewall suko defee nga mëna saytu liggéeyu reso bi.
TweakWhy_SharedExperiences: Dafay may Windows mu séddoo liggéey ci diggante say costéef jaaraleko ci sa sàqum Microsoft. Desactiver dafay tax liggéey bi nekk ci masin bii kese.
TweakWhy_ShareMenu: Yokk tànneef Séddoo ci mënu kontekstu klike ci ndeyjoor ngir fichier yi, may la nga séddoo leen jaaraleko ci aplikaasioŋ yi wala séddoo Windows bi gëna jege.
TweakWhy_SharingMappedDrives: Dafay may disk reso yiñ mappe ñu mëna feeñ ci (administratër) yi ak ci jëfandikukat bi dugg ci net bi. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_SharingWizard: Aktiwise assistant séddoo fichier bu yomb soo bësee ci fichier wala dossier ak sa ndeyjoor ba noppi tànn séddoo ko.
TweakWhy_ShortcutArrow: Dafay wane wala nëbb ikonu fett bu ndaw bi ci kaw fichier gaawaay yi ngir wane ni gaawaay lañu te duñu fichier yi njëkk.
TweakWhy_ShortcutsSuffix: Dafay saytu ndax Windows dafay yokk - Gaawaay ci tur gaawaay yu bees yiñ sos ci biro bi.
TweakWhy_ShutdownFromLockScreen: Dafay saytu ndax butoŋu tëj ak tàmbaliwaat dañuy feeñ ci ekraŋu tëjug Windows bi.
TweakWhy_SigninInfo: Jëfandikool say leerali dugg ngir jeexal ci saasi tabb sa profil ginaaw yeesal Windows. Def ngir gëna am kumpa.
TweakWhy_SleepButton: Dafay saytu ndax tànneef Nelaw bi dafay feeñ ci Mënu Tàmbali bi ak ndax butoŋu klawieru nelaw bi dafay dox.
TweakWhy_SleepTimeout: Dafay saytu kañ la monitër bi di fay ak kañ la PC bi duggee ci mode nelaw ginaaw bimu demee ba noppi. Def ngir moytu nelaw ci saasi.
TweakWhy_SMB1: SMBv1 protocolu séddoo fichier la bu yàgg te bari ay jafe-jafe, ñu xamee ko ci EternalBlue. Deactivé fileek soxlawul ci aparey reso yu yàgg lool. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_SMBServer: Aktiwise serwëru fichier SMB biy may yeneen ordinatër yi ci reso bi ñu mëna jëfandikoo dosiye yiñ bokk ak imprimante yi ci PC bii. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_SnapAssist: Soo jëlee benn palanteer ci benn wet, Windows dafay digal yeneen palanteer yu ubbeeku ngir feesal barab bi des. Desactivé snap te amul xalaat.
TweakWhy_StandbyFix: Standby bu bees bi (S0) mën na waral CPU bu bari ak jëfandikoo kuuraŋ fekk PC bi dafa melni ku nelaw. Fix bii dafay soppi doxalinu nelaw yu xóot yu melni S3.
TweakWhy_StartAccountNotifications: Microsoft mën na wone yëgle ak laaj yu jëm ci sàq ci Mënu Tàmbali bi. nëbb dina dindi yii.
TweakWhy_StartLayout: Dafay saytu rasio jëmmu Windows 11 Mënu tàmbali bi ci diggante aplikaasioŋ yiñ tëye ak ëmbiit liñ digal.
TweakWhy_StartMenuAllSectionCategories: Bépp wàll bu am kategori ci Tàmbali (24H2+)
TweakWhy_StartRecommendationsTips: Mënu Tàmbali bi mën na wane ay xelal ci man-mani Windows ak xalaati aplikaasioŋ yu bees. nëbb dafay dindi xalaat yooyu.
TweakWhy_StartRecommendedSection: Dafay wane wala nëbb wàll wiñ digal ci suufu Mënu Tàmbali bi. Ci edisioŋ Enterprise ak Education mën nañu ko nëbb jaaraleko ci politik.
TweakWhy_StartupSound: Dafa koy yëggal Windows startup chime su desktop bi nëbbee ba noppi dugg.
TweakWhy_StickyShift: Soo bësee Shift juróomi yoon, dafay gaaw def dialog biy wane ni ñuy jëfandikoo Sticky Keys. Def ko ngir moytu lii dakkal sa liggéey.
TweakWhy_StorageSense: Dafay dindi ci saasi bayaalu disk bi ci waxtu wiñ ko jàppee, ci efaase fichier yu yàgg yi, yebbite yu yàgg yi ak ëmbiitu Recycle Bin.
TweakWhy_Superfetch: SysMain dafay njëkka sargal aplikaasioŋ yi ñuy faral di jëfandikoo ci RAM ngir gaawlu waxtu ubbite bi. Ci SSD yi du am njariñ lu bari te mën nañu ko dindi ci jàmm. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_SuperHiddenFiles: Dafay wane fichier sistemu Windows yiñ aar ci Exploratëru fichier yi. Loolu dañu ko nëbb ngir moytu ñu soppi wala ñu efaase ko ci anam wu jaarul yoon.
TweakWhy_SuspendAirstrikeAttack: Dafay nëbb tànneefi reso bi ci ekraŋu tëjukaayu Windows bi. Dafay tere soppi jekkal reso bi laata ngay dugg. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_SyncNotifications: OneDrive ak yeneen furnisër yiy senkronise mën nañu wane yëgle yuy fësal ci biir Explorer. Def ngir nëbb yii banner.
TweakWhy_TailoredExperiences: Jëfandikool say done saytu ngir wane ay xelal yuñ la personaalise bu bawoo ci Microsoft. Desactiver daf lay dindi.
TweakWhy_TaskbarCombine: Ni ñuy boolee butoŋu baraabu liggéey yi
TweakWhy_TaskbarEndTask: Yokk Jeexal Liggéey ci mënu kontekstu bar liggéey
TweakWhy_TaskbarWidgets: Butoŋu widget yi ci baraabu liggéey bi
TweakWhy_TaskManagerDetails: Ubbi Task Manager ci onglet Details biy wane bépp liggéey ci barabu gis-gis bu gàtt bu yomb.
TweakWhy_TaskViewButton: Butoŋu Xool liggéey bi ci baraabu liggéey bi
TweakWhy_Teredo: Teredo ab protokol tunneling la buy joxe lëkkaloo IPv6 ci kaw reso IPv4. Dañu ko soxla ngir lëkkaloo ak Xbox Live ak yenn aplikaasioŋ peer-to-peer. Lii coppite bu am risk la, te mën na nekk lu jafe wala lu jafe ñu delloo ko.
TweakWhy_ThisPC: Dafay wane wala nëbb ikonu PC bii ci sa biro ngir gaaw ci jëfandikoo disk yi ak aparey yi.
TweakWhy_ThumbnailCache: Windows dafay denc nataal yu ndaw yi ci biir benn fichier base de done bu nëbbu ngir gaawlu seet ci dosiye yi. Deactivate dafay tere cache bi denc ci disk bi.
TweakWhy_Thumbnails: Dafay wane nataal yi ak wideo yi ñuy wane ci Explorer ci barabu ikonu xeetu fichier buñ miin. Desactiver dafay wane ikon yi kese.
TweakWhy_ThumbsDBOnNetwork: Windows dafay sos fichier Thumbs.db yu nëbbu ci reso bi ñuy séddoo ngir denc nataal yu ndaw yi. Deactivate dafay tere ñu sos fichier yii ci barabi reso bi.
TweakWhy_TitleBarColor: Kulòoru barabu titre palanteer bi ngir méngoo ak sa melo aksan Windows ci barab bi nga leen di wane ci weex wala dóomu-taal.
TweakWhy_TrayIcons: Dafay wane ikonu barabu yëgle yépp ci tegukaayu sistem bi, du nëbb ikonu overflow yi ci ginaaw fett biy yaatal.
TweakWhy_UnknownNetworks: Defar profil reso biñ jagleel lëkkalekaay reso bu bees wala buñu xamul suñu leen njëkkee gis. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_UnpinTaskbarShortcuts: Dindi gaawaayu bar liggéey yiñ boole
TweakWhy_UpdateAdobereaderDCSTIG: Dafay jëfandikoo ay jekkal sàrti kaaraange ngir Adobe Reader DC boole ci anam wu aar, xool buñ aar, ak dindi man-mani cloud ak web. Lii coppite bu am risk la, te mën na nekk lu jafe wala lu jafe ñu delloo ko.
TweakWhy_UpdateAutoDownload: Dafay saytu ndax Windows Update dafay yebbi ci saasi coppite yi ci ginaaw. Deactivate daf lay may nga tànn kañ ngay yebbi yeesali yeesali. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_UpdateCipherSuites: Defar cifer SCHANNEL yiñ taamu ci AES-256 ak AES-128 yu am doole. Fexe am encryption bu dëgër ci bépp lëkkaloo TLS. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_UpdateDesktopRegistry: Dindi ikonu leeral bu ndaw biy feeñ ci biro bi sudee fond d'écran Windows Spotlight yi dañuy dox.
TweakWhy_UpdateDotNetStrongAuth: Dafay forse .NET Framework 4.x ak 2.x ñu jëfandikoo TLS biñ jagleel sistem bi ak kriptografi bu dëgër. Dafay tere aplikaasioŋu .NET yu yàgg yi ñu dellu ci cipher yu néew doole yi. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_UpdateDriver: Dafay saytu ndax Windows Update dafay yebbi ci saasi ba noppi samp dawalkatu aparey bi. Desactiver daf lay may nga mëna doxal dawalkat yi ak sa loxo. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_UpdateEventLogSize: Yokk dayo journaalu kaaraange Windows ba 1 MB. Dina jàppale ñu denc yeneen xew-xewu audit balaa ñuy soppi duggal yu yàgg yi.
TweakWhy_UpdateKeyExchanges: Dafay may Diffie-Hellman, ECDH, ak PKCS algorithm yiy weccoo caabi ci CHANNEL. Fexe matal weccoo caabi bu wóor ci kanam ngir lëkkaloo TLS yi. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_UpdateMicrosoftProducts: Suñu ko taal, Windows Update dafay saytu ba noppi samp ay yeesali yeneen losisel yu Microsoft yuñ samp ci wetu yeesali Windows yi.
TweakWhy_UpdateMSProducts: Suñu ko takkoo, Yeesal Windows dafay saytu itam ndax amna yeesali yeneen costéefi Microsoft yu melni Office. Defar yeesali Windows kese.
TweakWhy_UpdateMSRT: Dafay saytu ndax Windows Update dafay joxe jumtukaayu dindi losisel yu bonn yi. Deactivé dafay tere ñu push ko jaaraleko ci Windows Update. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_UpdatePowershell: PowerShell 7 shell bu bees la buy yegg ci platform yu bari, gëna am kàttan ak man-man yu gëna baax ci Windows PowerShell 5.1 biñ tabax ci biir. Ñu lëkkale ko ak PS7 telemetry.
TweakWhy_UpdateProtocols: TLS 1.0 ak 1.1 amatu ñu benn gaañ-gaañu buñu xamee. Soo leen dindi, dafay dëgëral sistem bi ci BEAST, POODLE, ak yeneen songe yu mel noonu. Re-enablement dañu ko wara def ludul ngir dëppoo ak legacy.
TweakWhy_UpdateRegistryPaths: Sosal bépp yoon registry bu ñàkk bu yeneen tweaks yu dëgër yi soxla balaa ñuy daw. Lii jéego bu war la te amul benn njeexte buy wane jëfandikukat bi.
TweakWhy_UpdateRestart: Dafay tere Windows tàmbaliwaat ci saasi ginaaw boo samp yeesali te doo dugal sa kàddu. Daf lay may nga mëna tànn bi reboot yi di am.
TweakWhy_UseStoreOpenWith: Dafay wane wala nëbb tànneef Seetal aplikaasioŋ ci Màngasiinu Microsoft biy feeñ ci dialog Ubbi Ak ngir xeeti fichier yi amul benn lëkkaloo.
TweakWhy_UWPAccountInfo: Dafay saytu ndax aplikaasioŋu UWP yi mën nañu jëfandikoo sa tur kontu, sa nataal ak yeneen leerali kontu.
TweakWhy_UWPApps: Ubbi ab dialog tànneef ngir dindi wala defaraat aplikaasioŋu Windows Store yiñ tànn. Yenn dindi yi benn yoon kese lañu, ba ci yooni defaraat yiñ jàppale mën nañu ba leegi soxla Microsoft Store, winget, wala toppatoowaat ak loxo. Lii ab package bu bari risk la, du ab toggle bu yomb.
TweakWhy_UWPCalendar: Dafay saytu ndax aplikaasioŋu UWP yi mën nañu lire ak bind ci sa done almanak.
TweakWhy_UWPCallHistory: Dafay saytu ndax aplikaasioŋu UWP yi mën nañu jàng jaar-jaaru woote yi.
TweakWhy_UWPContacts: Dafay saytu ndax aplikaasioŋu UWP yi mën nañu dugg ci sa limu jokkookat yi.
TweakWhy_UWPDiagInfo: Dafay saytu ndax aplikaasioŋu UWP yi mën nañu dajale ay leeral ci sa aparey ak tolluwaayam.
TweakWhy_UWPEmail: Dafay saytu ndax aplikaasioŋu UWP yi mën nañu lire ak yónnee imeel ci sa tur.
TweakWhy_UWPFileSystem: Dafay saytu ndax aplikaasioŋu UWP yi mën nañu jëfandikoo fichier yi fépp ci sa sistem fichier ginaaw seeni dosiye app. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_UWPMessaging: Dafay saytu ndax aplikaasioŋu UWP yi mën nañu jàng wala yónnee mesaas.
TweakWhy_UWPNotifications: Dafay saytu ndax aplikaasioŋu UWP yi mën nañu yónnee yëgle yi ci santu yëgle Windows bi.
TweakWhy_UWPOtherDevices: Dafay saytu ndax aplikaasioŋu UWP yi mën nañu jëfandikoo yeneen aparey yuñ boole te bokkul ak kategori yu gëna mag.
TweakWhy_UWPPhoneCalls: Dafay saytu ndax aplikaasioŋu UWP yi mën nañu woote telefon wala yor ko.
TweakWhy_UWPRadios: Dafay saytu ndax aplikaasioŋu UWP yi mën nañu saytu Bluetooth ak yeneen aparey radio yu amul kable.
TweakWhy_UWPSwapFile: Fichier weccoo UWP (swapfile.sys) aplikaasioŋu Màngasin Windows yi ñoo koy jëfandikoo ngir page mémoire virtuel. Soo jëfandikoowul aplikaasioŋu Màngasiin, nga dindi palaas ci disk bi. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_UWPTasks: Dafay saytu ndax aplikaasioŋu UWP yi mën nañu jëfandikoo sa limu liggéey ak def.
TweakWhy_UWPVoiceActivation: Dafay saytu ndax mën nañu aktive aplikaasioŋu UWP yi ci ndigalu baat ci ginaaw.
TweakWhy_VerboseStatus: Dafay wane mesaas yu leer ci jamonoy tàmbali ak tëju Windows ci barabu spinner yobbu buñ yamale.
TweakWhy_VisualFX: Mooy saytu jekkal effet visuel yépp. Performance dafay dindi animasioŋ yi ngir gëna am yëg-yëg. Melokaan mooy may bépp effet.
TweakWhy_WAPPush: Sarwiisu mesaas WAP Push dafay jot mesaas ci air biy joge ci operatëri telefoon yi. Dañu koy bariwul luñu koy soxla ci PC bu boolewul ak reso mobile.
TweakWhy_WebLangList: Dafay boole sa limu làkk yi nga taamu ak serwëru Microsoft suko defee ëmbiitu web bi méngoo ak say tànneef. Def ngir gëna am kumpa.
TweakWhy_WebSearch: Dafay boole njariñu web Bing ci barabu seetug Windows. Deactivate dafay tax seetug sistem bi di wane fichier ak jekkal yi ci dëkk bi kese.
TweakWhy_WhatsNewInWindows: Dafay wane ay banner ak ay laaj yuy wane man-mani Windows yu bees yi ginaaw yeesali yi. Def ngir dindi yëgle yii.
TweakWhy_WiFiSense: WiFi Sense mën na séddoo sa baatu-jàll WiFi ci saasi ak say xarit. Deactivate dafay tere séddoo bi.
TweakWhy_Win32LongPathLimit: Dindi na 260 araf ci yoonu fichier bi gëna mag ci aplikaasioŋu Win32. Dañu ko soxla ci yenn jumtukaayi developpement ak jumtukaayi dosiye yu jafee xam.
TweakWhy_WindowsCapabilities: Ubbi dialog man-mani yiñ mëna tànn ngir yokk wala dindi màndarga Windows yu melni paketu làkk wala jumtukaayi RSAT. Recovery mën na soxla jëfandikoo Windows Update, fichier source, wala tàmbaliwaat topp, kon lii dañu ko wara jàppee ni njiitu package moo gën toggle bu yomb.
TweakWhy_WindowsColorMode: Dafay tànn ndax shell Windows (bar de travail, Mënu tàmbali, santaru jëf) dafay jëfandikoo mode Lëndëm wala Leer.
TweakWhy_WindowsFeatures: Ubbi dialog Taalal wala fay man-mani Windows ngir mëna wala def ay mbir yu Windows yu melni Hyper-V wala Telnet. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_WindowsGameMode: Lii mooy sëtal seting Windows Modu jeu bi ñu dugal, du doon doxalin profili Gaming bu Baseline. Windows Modu jeu dafay jël ay process yu mànde as ñu jiitu te dafay dindal liggéeyu ginaaw. Ay jëfandikoo kat dañuy dindi ko ngir steadiness bu streaming walla recording, ndax ay soppiu priority mën na ñàkkal encoder.
TweakWhy_WindowsLatestUpdate: Bindal PC bii ngir jot yeesali Windows yi ci saa si ñu génne, du xaar ñu génne ko ndànk-ndànk. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_WindowsManageDefaultPrinter: May Windows mu def ci saasi sa imprimante bi nga gëna jëfandikoo ci default. Deactivate dafay tax imprimeur bi nga tann ak loxo nekk ci barab bu baax.
TweakWhy_WindowsSandbox: Masin virtuel bu woyof te kenn mënu ko jëfandikoo ngir mëna doxal aplikaasioŋ yi nga wóoluwul te doo risk sa sistem bu mag. Dafay laaj Windows Pro wala lu gëna ndaw.
TweakWhy_WindowsScriptHost: Dafay saytu ndax Windows mën na doxal fichier script .vbs ak .js. Deactivation dafay tere xeetu script yii dox soo klike ñaari yoon. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_WindowsTips: Sooy liggéey, Windows dafay wane ay xelal ak ay xalaat yuy jameet. Deactivation dafay taxawal dagg yooyu.
TweakWhy_WindowsWelcomeExperience: Dafay wane xëtu dalal bu mat sëkk ginaaw yeesali Windows yu mag yiy wane man-mani yu bees. Def ngir teggi ekraŋ bii.
TweakWhy_WPBT: WPBT tablo losisel la buy may defarkat yi ñu mëna doxal losisel bi Windows di tàmbali. Deactivate dafay tere executables yi defarkat bi dugal ci saasi dox. Coppite bii dafa am risk bu yam te mën na indi jafe-jafe ci yenn liggéey.
TweakWhy_XboxGameBar: Xbox Game Bar dafay nekk ci biir jeu bi (Win+G) ngir jël ay nataal, enregistrement wideo, ak di wottu ni sistem bi di doxee.
TweakWhy_XboxGameTips: Dafay wane tegtali ak tegtal yi ci biir Xbox Game Bar. Defar ko sudee xam nga Game Bar.
